message:
feat(fsqlite-mvcc): commit-time SSI validation with proof-carrying artifacts (bd-31bo)

Implements §5.7.3 ssi_validate_and_publish: 7-step algorithm for
dangerous structure detection (write skew prevention). Covers:
- SsiState per-transaction tracking (has_in_rw, has_out_rw, edges)
- Edge discovery from hot plane (active txns) + RCRI (committed readers)
  + CommitLog (committed writers) — no false negatives
- Pivot rule (conservative overapproximation)
- T3 near-miss rule (mark active pivots, abort on committed pivots)
- Evidence artifacts: DependencyEdge, CommitProof, AbortWitness
- ActiveTxnView trait for testable abstraction
- 26 unit tests + 2 integration tests (write skew, concurrent inserts)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
